verdict_one_line: Cheap and mildly accretive on brand-moat axis but does not move technical / geo / unit-econ moats. Ranks 5th of 5 candidate P0s. Reject as headline iteration; approve as parallel side-quest only.

p0_ranking_this_week.reason: converts today's reprice from hypothesis to revenue; without checkout the multi-currency + plique pricing work is theoretical
the only artifact a competitor literally cannot clone; moves brand + geo moats simultaneously
third-party proof structurally moves brand moat; current ambiguity is a credibility tax
Bonhams Doyle Rago Masriera lots defend the $1,599-$1,799 anchor; without this the reprice reads as markup
moves brand-moat axis +1 notch by closing one editorial-register gap; trivially copyable; orthogonal to all other moat work

panel_avg_prediction.rationale: Editorial register sub-score moves +1.5 to +2.5 for 闻献 / SBB persona; VC docks -0.2 for misallocation while Stripe is dark; Emma cold-visitor 0; net thin positive.

pre_mortem_top_risks.risk: plique-a-jour accent collision in H1 if line-height < 1.05
pre_mortem_top_risks.mitigation: explicit line-height: 1.05 minimum on display H1; hard-test plique-a-jour string in H1 before merge

pre_mortem_top_risks.risk: Cormorant becomes the next template-tier serif within 12-18 months
pre_mortem_top_risks.mitigation: use parent Cormorant not Garamond at display; deliberate tracking + scale; re-evaluate in 2027

pre_mortem_top_risks.risk: Brand-loop oxygen consumed by chrome at wrong stage - Stripe / photos / 国礼 stay at zero
pre_mortem_top_risks.mitigation: loop should refuse chrome iterations while deal-blocker P0s are open or explicitly parked

pre_mortem_top_risks.risk: Executor implements Cormorant Garamond at H1 instead of parent Cormorant
pre_mortem_top_risks.mitigation: code review checklist: confirm @font-face loads Cormorant-Medium and Cormorant-SemiBold parent files, not Cormorant-Garamond variants, for the display tier

pre_mortem_top_risks.risk: Panel scores +2 on chrome, owner reads loop as working, optimizes for more chrome iters - meta-process drift
pre_mortem_top_risks.mitigation: prepend P0 status panel to every triage doc so chrome work is visibly framed as opportunity cost

conditions_to_approve_as_headline: Stripe Payment Links live for at least 2 of 4 plique SKUs
6 real Hu Yan at-bench photos staged for upload
OR explicit owner decision to park P0s with a specific reason
if_executed_anyway_minimum_bar: Use parent Cormorant (not Cormorant Garamond) for H1 and H2
Line-height >= 1.05 on display H1 - mandatory for plique-a-jour accent clearance
Test plique-a-jour and a-votre-service in H1 before merge
CN body weight bump to 500 for Noto Serif SC to match Cormorant 500 EN
Self-host all woff2 - no Google Fonts CDN (China firewall + privacy)
Bundle as parallel side-quest with whichever P0 ships next; do not run a standalone panel cycle on it
